data.title: The crypto sector opened weakly on the US stock market, with Strategy (MSTR) falling 2.38%.
data.description: According to data from msx.com, at the opening of the US stock market, the Dow Jones Industrial Average rose 0.15%, the S&P 500 rose 0.19%, and the Nasdaq Composite fell 0.12%. The crypto sector generally saw a pullback, with Bitmine down 3.41%, Strategy (MSTR) down 2.38%, SharpLink down 1.80%, Coinbase down 1.64%, Circle down 4.72%, and Solana down 1.35%. msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, covering US stock and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

data.title: XRP Faces Challenges in Sustaining Rallies Above $2
data.description: XRP's price struggles to maintain rallies above the $2 mark due to a substantial sell wall of approximately 1.86 billion XRP coins just below this level. According to NS3.AI, successful rallies necessitate strong buying volume and significant exchange outflows to absorb this supply, a scenario that has only materialized once in early January. While whale accumulation is taking place, it remains inadequate to counteract the persistent sell pressure. As a result, XRP remains at risk of declining if it fails to decisively break above $1.99.

data.title: A whale spent $5.6 million to go long on silver and gold, while simultaneously shorting NVDA.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, a whale (0x8709...AC54) spent 5.6 million USDC to buy 1066 XAUT tokens at a price of $5261. Subsequently, this address deposited 3.5 million USDC into Hyperliquid, opened long positions for 53,528 SILVER tokens (worth $6.48 million) and 158.36 GOLD tokens (worth $876,000), and simultaneously shorted 4229 NVDA tokens (worth $809,000).

data.title: ZetaChain Unveils 2.0 Version with Privacy-Focused AI Interface
data.description: ZetaChain has introduced its 2.0 version, which includes Anuma, an AI interface prioritizing privacy and supporting various AI models with private user memory. According to NS3.AI, the platform seeks to address fragmentation within the AI ecosystem by facilitating applications that function across different blockchains and AI models, incorporating privacy and monetization features. ZetaChain 2.0 also offers a developer SDK designed to streamline the creation of privacy-centric, multi-model AI applications, along with global payment options.

data.title: U.S. Government Shutdown Probability Drops to 42%
data.description: The likelihood of a U.S. government shutdown has significantly decreased to 42%, according to NS3.AI. Both political parties have evaluated the substantial costs linked to a shutdown, leading to this reduction in probability. This change may alleviate some immediate economic uncertainty and influence investor sentiment.

data.title: U.S. Jobless Claims Slightly Exceed Expectations
data.description: The U.S. initial jobless claims for the week ending January 24 were reported at 209,000, slightly higher than the anticipated 205,000. According to NS3.AI, the previous week's jobless claims were revised upward from 200,000 to 210,000. This data suggests a marginally weaker labor market than expected.

data.title: BRICS Alliance Seeks to Reduce US Dollar Dependency in Trade
data.description: The BRICS alliance is working towards eliminating the US dollar from their trade transactions to avoid hidden costs and revenue loss associated with currency conversions. According to NS3.AI, experts emphasize that using direct local currency exchanges would decrease reliance on the US dollar and lessen vulnerabilities tied to US economic policies. The long-term goal is to establish a more diversified international monetary system that is less dominated by the US dollar.

data.title: ASML monopoly on EUV lithography underpins Nvidia’s AI growth story
data.description:
Nvidia is the world’s most valuable company because its chips run modern artificial intelligence. Those chips do not exist on their own. They come from a supply chain that depends on one company. That company is ASML. Without ASML, advanced AI chips do not get made at scale. The Dutch firm builds the machines that […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/asml-monopoly-on-euv-lithography-nvidia/

data.title: XRP Millionaire Wallets Return as Large Holders Accumulate
data.description:
The number of XRP wallets holding at least 1 million tokens has begun rising again, reaching 2,016 wallets as of January 29, 2026. This marks the first meaningful recovery in this high-balance cohort since September 2025, ending a four-month period of steady decline during which roughly 784 millionaire wallets exited the ledger.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/xrp-millionaire-wallets-return-as-large-holders-accumulate/

data.title: Copper Prices Surge Over 10% to Record High on London Metal Exchange
data.description: Copper prices on the London Metal Exchange (LME) have surged by more than 10%, reaching a new record high of over $14,400 per ton. According to PANews, this significant increase marks a historic peak for copper prices on the exchange. The rise in copper prices reflects ongoing market dynamics and demand fluctuations.

data.title: Robinhood invests in crypto trading platform Talos, valuing the company at $1.5 billion.
data.description: Robinhood (HOOD) announced its participation in Talos's Series B extended funding round. This $45 million funding round brings Talos's total Series B funding to $150 million, valuing the company at approximately $1.5 billion. New strategic investors include Sony Innovation Fund, IMC, QCP, and Karatage, while existing shareholders a16z crypto, BNY, and Fidelity Investments continued to participate. Talos primarily provides crypto trading lifecycle technology to institutional investors and banks, managing approximately $21 trillion in assets. This funding will help Talos deepen its blockchain strategy and expand its M&A activities. Previously, Talos acquired Cloudwall (risk management), Skolem (institutional-grade DeFi), D3X Systems (portfolio building), and Coin Metrics, valued at over $100 million.

data.title: Fidelity Investments to Introduce Stablecoin on Ethereum in 2026
data.description: Fidelity Investments is set to launch a U.S. dollar-backed stablecoin, FIDD, in early February 2026 on the Ethereum blockchain. According to NS3.AI, the stablecoin will be issued by Fidelity Digital Assets, which gained approval as a national trust bank from the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency (OCC) in December 2025. This development signifies Fidelity's strategic entry into the regulated stablecoin market, utilizing Ethereum's robust infrastructure.

data.title: Bitcoin ZK-Rollup Project Citrea Launches Mainnet with DeFi Offerings
data.description:
On January 29, the Bitcoin ZK-rollup project Citrea, backed by Founders Fund and Galaxy Ventures, officially launched its mainnet. According to BlockBeats, Citrea aims to integrate idle Bitcoin into a comprehensive DeFi and payment system by introducing DeFi lending, structured products, and a native dollar stablecoin, ctUSD, collateralized by BTC.

Citrea anticipates that active DeFi liquidity could reach $50 million in the initial phase of the mainnet launch. The stablecoin ctUSD is issued by MoonPay and is pegged 1:1 to cash and short-term U.S. Treasury bonds. It is natively issued on Citrea to minimize bridging risks and prevent liquidity fragmentation.

The project has sparked debate over whether non-payment uses like DeFi and stablecoins should support Bitcoin miners' fee income as block subsidies decrease. Proponents argue these uses provide sustainable demand, while opponents believe Bitcoin's block space should focus on simple, censorship-resistant payments.

Notably, during Citrea's testnet phase, data availability usage accounted for nearly 10% of Bitcoin's monthly data bandwidth, indicating that Rollup could significantly impact Bitcoin's block space.
